title: French Fermented Plant-Based Tart
description: A richly flavored, plant-based tart inspired by French cuisine, featuring a fermented filling.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough and place it in a tart pan.
In a blender, combine the fermented Dutch plant-based cream, rerremen, cocoa powder, and coconut sugar. Blend until smooth.
Pour the filling into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Bake the tart for 40-45 minutes, or until the filling is set and the crust is golden brown.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool to room temperature.
Drizzle with vanilla extract before serving.
